---
title: "Cibersort Proteomics"
author: "Shubham Agrawal"
date: "2026-07-14"
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: "hide"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load the dds object

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/protoemics.Rds")
se
```
```{r}
protMat <- assay(se)
head(protMat)
```
```{r}
rd <- rowData(se)
head(rd)
```
```{r}
dim(rd)
length(unique(rd$Gene))
length(unique(rd$ProteinID))
```
```{r}
gene <- rd$Gene
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(
  gene = gene,
  protMat,
  check.names = FALSE
)

# Average proteins mapping to the same gene
expr_gene <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene), gene != "") %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

expr_gene <- as.data.frame(expr_gene)
rownames(expr_gene) <- expr_gene$gene
expr_gene$gene <- NULL
```
